rules.lead-brain: Keep the user's goal, progress, context, boundaries, and final judgment in the Command Room.
rules.prompt-contract: Delegate execution through self-contained natural-language prompts.
rules.optional-planning: Conversation uses no container and clear bounded work skips Planning.
rules.planning-angles: Optional Planning uses independent forward and opposition AIs from the same Chair brief; the Chair forms one spec.
rules.optional-technical-design: Use independent Technical Design angles only when implementation choices materially affect the result or risk.
rules.execution-review: Every Execution N is followed by a different AI in Review N against the actual result.
rules.findings-loop: Review writes natural-language findings; the Chair alone may explicitly call Execution N+1 with the current workspace and prior findings.
rules.background-control-lane: Command Room child work runs in background, returns through an automatic sequential Chair wakeup, and does not block human-Chair discussion.
rules.project-lifecycle: Accepted Review starts fixed Project Steward after explicit close_task; explicit project_complete starts Debt and Learning Curators before final governance Execution and Review.
rules.professional-roles: Use a professional role for each one-shot task.
rules.no-program-control: Program logic may transport text and record objective facts, but must not decide AI work.
rules.hard-boundaries: Ask before a production/public effect, credentials or secrets, money, customer/private data exposure, deletion/migration, irreversible action, or a boundary/permission expansion.
rules.skillopt-regression: SkillOpt sends the skill and scenarios to an independent review AI; it does not run or replace the working AIs.

lead-brain: goal, progress, context, boundaries, and final judgment
optional-planning: Conversation, clarification, and direct Chair answers use no container
execution-review: Every real action uses an Execution cycle
Every Execution N is followed by a different AI in Review N
background-control-lane: automatically wakes a new sequential Chair Run
project-lifecycle: project complete starts fixed Debt and Learning Curators
skillopt-regression: does not run or replace the working AIs
